title: Spiny Toad
move_pattern: Cycles: Protruding Spikes → Spike Explosion → Tongue Lash → repeat
notes: The Spiny Toad alternates between a spiked and unspiked state. Protruding Spikes arms itself with 5 Thorns (dealing damage back to attackers). Spike Explosion fires those spikes as an attack and removes the Thorns. Tongue Lash is a simple follow-up attack before the cycle repeats.
